string-array.name: rooster_descriptions
string-array.item: An upgraded sea titan with reinforced tentacles and bioluminescent armor.
A majestic bird of flame capable of widespread aerial incineration.
A heavy siege construct designed to shatter city walls with kinetic energy.
A master of illusion that confuses enemies with clones and mirrors.
The original terror of the deep, known for dragging ships into the abyss.
The standard avian flame-spirit, loyal and devastating in combat.
A basic heavy-armor unit built for high-impact frontal assaults.
An agile rogue unit that uses smoke and speed to evade capture.
An elemental being that controls high-altitude gale forces and storms.
A dark-scaled drake that breathes shadow flames and resists magic.
An ancient stone giant that leaves craters with every massive footstep.
An eldritch monstrosity from the void that causes fear in all who look at it.
A scout bird of prey enhanced with steel talons and keen vision.
The pride of the kingdom, wearing gilded armor and leading the charge.
A noble beast of the plains, faster than any standard cavalry mount.
A standard messenger crow trained for battlefield reconnaissance.
The highest tier of griffin, capable of carrying multiple armored riders.
A legendary hero unit specializing in defensive tactical formations.
A massive white-furred lion known for its incredible raw strength.
A holy warrior that deals extra damage to undead and demonic foes.
A young squire of the Smiter order, learning the ways of holy combat.
A smaller, agile breed of the Whitemane lineage used for flanking.
A mage-hunter equipped with tools to dispel and silence enemy spells.
A master swordsman who excels in one-on-one combat scenarios.
A brutal enforcer that specializes in breaking enemy morale.
A staunch defender of tradition, boasting the highest defense in the roster.
A swift cavalry unit that uses lions to navigate difficult terrain.
The backbone of the royal guard, deadly with both lance and shield.
A basic infantryman sworn to protect the royal bloodline.
A student of the blade practicing basic parrying and riposte.
A standard guard responsible for maintaining order in the ranks.
A light support unit that uses basic magic to cleanse debuffs.
A tank unit encased in full plate armor, nearly impervious to arrows.
An elite marksman who never misses a shot, even from extreme range.
A scavenger unit that thrives on looting and battlefield utility.
A long-reach infantryman effective against charging cavalry.
A heavy ranged unit firing bolts that can pierce through multiple enemies.
